title: Discrete Mathematics_ Graph Theory - Degree of Graph - Theoretical/Not Answered

questions.question:
A graph is \( d \) – regular if every vertex has degree \( d \). For a \( d \) – regular graph on \( n \) vertices, which of the following must be TRUE?



TIFR CSE 2019 | Part B | Question: 3
options: At least one of \( d \) and \( n \) is odd
At least one of \( d \) and \( n \) is even
